name: Pulse Plan
shortDesc: A full-stack productivity app that unifies daily scheduling, yearly goal tracking, web-based event discovery, and visual learning maps — built to reduce planning friction.
pmHighlights: Defined user stories across 4 core feature areas before writing a single line of code
Prioritized MVP scope: daily calendar + scraper first, mind map as Phase 2
Designed a behavioral data loop — accept/ignore actions train a suggestion engine
Shipped features incrementally and validated each interaction flow end-to-end
Applied Jobs-to-be-Done thinking: the core job is 'help me decide what to do next'

features.title: Daily Calendar
features.desc: Month-view calendar with color-coded task dots, one-click day drill-down, full task CRUD with priority and category system

features.title: Web Scraper & Action Center
features.desc: Paste any event URL — the app extracts activities and presents them as decision cards (Add / Ignore), reducing context-switching overhead

features.title: Smart Suggestions
features.desc: Behavioral learning engine records accept/ignore history per category and surfaces personalized recommendation reasons on future scrapes

features.title: Visual Mind Map
features.desc: Interactive SVG node map with real-time animated progress rings, zoom/pan canvas, drill-down subtask management — built without any graph library

features.title: Yearly Goal Tracker
features.desc: Goal cards with milestone checklists; completing milestones auto-calculates overall goal progress percentage
